description.value:
Disease: Demon Fever — Severity: [Deadly]

The character has been exposed to Demon Fever but shows no symptoms yet. The disease is incubating. At the end of the incubation period, Stage 1 effects begin.

Vector: Daemon claws or bites, nexus-adjacent contamination, exposure to corrupted pneuma

Incubation: Roll 1d8 days.

system.vector: Daemon claws or bites, nexus-adjacent contamination, exposure to corrupted pneuma
